app.tagline: Test your geography: capitals, flags, borders, currencies, languages and locating places on the world map.

game.placePin: Tap the map to drop your pin

prompts.capitalToCountry: {{capital}} is the capital of which country?
prompts.whichFlag: Which country does this flag belong to?
prompts.border: Which country shares a border with {{country}}?
prompts.language: What is the main language of {{country}}?
prompts.mostPopulated: Which is the most populous country?
prompts.leastPopulated: Which is the least populous country?
prompts.worldcup: Locate {{city}} — host city of the 2026 World Cup ({{country}})

campaign.title: Campaign
campaign.tagline: Learn the world's countries continent by continent.
campaign.passThreshold: You need 75% correct answers to unlock the next level.

capital-mc.label: Capital — MCQ
capital-mc.description: Choose the country's capital from 4 options.

capital-text.label: Capital — Type
capital-text.description: Type the name of the country's capital.

capital-to-country-mc.label: Capital → Country — MCQ
capital-to-country-mc.description: Find the country from its capital.

flag-text.label: Flag — Type
flag-text.description: Identify the country from its flag.

border-mc.label: Bordering country — MCQ
border-mc.description: Among 4 countries, which one shares a border with the given country?

language-mc.label: Language — MCQ
language-mc.description: What is a country's main language?

largest-area-mc.label: Largest — MCQ
largest-area-mc.description: Among 4 countries, which has the largest area?

most-populated-mc.label: Most populous — MCQ
most-populated-mc.description: Among 4 countries, which has the most inhabitants?

least-populated-mc.label: Least populous — MCQ
least-populated-mc.description: Among 4 countries, which has the fewest inhabitants?

locate-country.label: Locate a country
locate-country.description: Place the requested country on the world map.

locate-city.label: Locate a city
locate-city.description: Place the requested city on the world map.

worldcup-2026.label: 2026 World Cup
worldcup-2026.description: Locate the 2026 World Cup host cities (USA, Canada, Mexico).

mixed.label: Mixed — review
mixed.description: A mix of all questions, all modes combined.

daily.label: Daily challenge
daily.description: A daily quiz, the same for everyone, once a day.

streak-10.label: On fire
streak-10.description: Get 10 correct answers in a row.
